meta_title: For Freelancers: Claude Code skills setup to Solve slow development speed (Intermediate Idea List)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome slow development speed. A Intermediate-level Idea List using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Claude Code Skills Setup for Freelancers: Speed Up Dev
content.seo_description: Master Claude Code skills setup to eliminate slow development cycles. A professional guide for freelancers to ship faster using Antigravity and AI.
content.answer_block: Eliminate slow development by integrating Claude Code into your workflow with Antigravity. By automating repetitive boilerplate, context-aware bug fixing, and terminal-based refactoring, you reduce manual overhead by 70%. This setup transforms your terminal into a high-velocity engineering engine, allowing you to ship professional-grade SaaS features in record time.
content.intro:
The clock is your greatest adversary. You’re staring at a blank IDE, the cursor blinking like a metronome counting down your profit margins. Every minute spent wrestling with boilerplate or context-switching between documentation and your terminal is a minute you aren't shipping for your clients. The difference between a struggling freelancer and a high-earning architect isn't just code—it's the velocity of their execution.

It is time to stop typing and start orchestrating. By mastering the Claude Code and Antigravity workflow, you move from being a manual laborer to a systems architect. This is the blueprint for a frictionless environment where your intent becomes production-ready code in seconds, not hours.

steps.title: Environment Context Injection
steps.description: Initialize your project structure so Claude Code understands your specific architectural patterns before you begin.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze this directory structure and create a project-specific context file that identifies our tech stack, coding standards, and preferred architectural patterns for Claude.

steps.title: Automated Boilerplate Generation
steps.description: Use Antigravity to define your base templates, then have Claude Code scaffold the files instantly.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a clean, modular express.js API structure with TypeScript, focusing on separation of concerns for a multi-tenant SaaS application.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "scaffold the api structure based on the antigravity template"

steps.title: Intelligent Refactoring Cycles
steps.description: Instead of manual refactoring, use CLI-based commands to optimize existing code blocks for performance.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Identify code smells in the current directory and suggest refactoring patterns that improve execution speed without breaking existing tests.

steps.title: Terminal-Driven Testing
steps.description: Automate test suite generation to ensure your new features don't introduce regressions.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create unit tests for the newly generated service layer using Jest, ensuring 90% coverage for edge cases.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "generate unit tests for all new files in src/services"

steps.title: Deployment Pipeline Sync
steps.description: Bridge the gap between development and production by configuring your CI/CD scripts via Claude.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow file that automates deployment to AWS Lambda upon merging to the main branch.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "generate ci/cd pipeline for aws deployment"

pro_tips: Always use a .claudeignore file to prevent the agent from indexing massive node_modules or build folders, saving token costs and latency.
Map your most frequent Antigravity prompts to shell aliases to execute complex refactors with a single keyword.
Use Claude Code's 'review' command on every pull request to catch logic errors before they reach your staging environment.
Maintain a 'knowledge.md' file in your root directory; Claude Code will read this to maintain consistency across long-term freelance projects.
Force Claude to use 'thought' mode for complex architectural decisions to ensure it evaluates multiple approaches before writing a single line of code.
content.next_steps: Begin by auditing your current project folder structure and setting up your .claudeignore file to ensure your AI assistant has a clean, focused workspace.
content.conversion_block: You now possess the toolkit to outpace any competition. Stop building slow and start shipping daily. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
